description_long: This object is a classic lipstick with a cylindrical black base and a beige midsection, topped with a vibrant red lipstick bullet. The lipstick is partially extended, revealing its smooth, rounded tip, ready for application. The cap, which is also black and has a slightly domed top, is shown removed and placed beside the main body. The surface of the base and cap appears matte and slightly textured, while the lipstick itself is glossy and smooth. There are no visible brand markings, decorative patterns, or text on any part of the object. The overall design is simple, functional, and typical of personal care products found in urban environments.
description: A classic black and beige lipstick with a glossy red tip and a matte black cap, featuring a simple, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the lipstick fully extended with the cap placed beside it, highlighting the red lipstick bullet and beige midsection.
description_view_1: Side view with the cap behind the lipstick, emphasizing the cylindrical shape and matte black finish of the cap and base.
description_view_2: Angled view similar to the front, but with the cap slightly further back, providing a clear look at the lipstick's smooth, rounded tip.
description_view_3: Direct front view of the lipstick with the cap not visible, focusing on the symmetry and clean lines of the lipstick and its beige midsection.
attribute_cap_design: The cap is cylindrical with a slightly domed top, matte black in color, and has a smooth, unadorned surface with no visible decorative elements.
